theme_and_archetype.domain: Internal Management App for Beauty Clinic (Tablet Optimized)
theme_and_archetype.core_concept: Editorial fashion magazine meets clinical precision. Ultra-premium, zero color, only grayscale, stark contrasts.

headings.usage: Massive editorial headings, PIN screen title, page headers. Use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Data tables, UI components, appointment details, buttons.

rules: H1s should be text-5xl or text-6xl, tracking-tighter, leading-none. Use Cormorant Garamond.
Labels should be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs, font-semibold. Use Manrope.
Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings.
HARD CONSTRAINT: Only black, white, and grayscale can be used. No other colors are permitted.
Never use pure black or white for BOTH background and container. Contrast is key.
Buttons: Black background with white text, or White background with black border.
Error states: Use black background with white text and an icon, rather than standard red.

layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID for Dashboard. MODE A: THE TETRIS GRID for PIN and Catalogue.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous. p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Tablet requires large touch targets.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Use 1px solid black borders for an editorial print feel. The UI should look like a printed magazine spread.
rules: Avoid Shadcn default cards. Use raw HTML div with border-black border-[1px] and rounded-none.
Never center everything. Asymmetry creates tension and interest.

components.navigation: Sidebar or Sticky Top Header with strict black/white contrast and thin 1px black dividing lines.
components.forms: Minimalist inputs. Use border-b border-black, with no side borders (brutalist editorial style), or sharp rectangles.
components.tables: Shadcn Table but override rounded corners. Headers in uppercase Manrope, text-xs. High contrast rows.
components.modals: Backdrop blur-xl with a stark white modal, sharp corners, 1px black border.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (light or thin weight) to maintain the delicate editorial aesthetic.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Invert colors on hover. Black becomes white (with black text), White becomes black. Or use subtle grayscale shifts.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Instant or very fast (0.15s ease-out). Clinical and precise.

media.rules: All images MUST use the 'grayscale' Tailwind class to enforce the B&W constraint.

image_urls.description: Luxurious clinic interior. Apply 'grayscale contrast-125 brightness-90' for an editorial, dramatic mood.
Female aesthetic doctor. Must apply 'grayscale' class.
Male aesthetic doctor. Must apply 'grayscale' class.

instructions_to_main_agent: HARD CONSTRAINT: Palette is strictly Black and White / Grayscale. Do not use standard semantic colors (red/green/yellow).
Build 5 main screens: 1. PIN Lock Entry Screen (PIN: 1234), 2. Daily Agenda View (timeline), 3. Weekly Calendar View, 4. New Appointment Form, 5. Service Catalog & Specialist Management.
Ensure 'Nueva Cita', 'Agenda del Día', and 'Catálogo de Servicios' are prominently accessible.
Business Logic: Prevent scheduling appointments for the same specialist at overlapping times.
The UI is intended for clinic reception tablets: ensure high legibility, large touch targets, and full-screen layouts.
Typography: Use Cormorant Garamond for main headers and Manrope for UI data/labels.
All interactive elements must include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='pin-input', data-testid='new-appointment-btn').
